refnamediv.refpurpose: Detect Harris corners in an image.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: fobj = imdetect_HARRIS(image [, maxCorners [, qualityLevel [, minDistance [, blockSize [, k]]]]])

listitem.para: Input image. Color images are converted to uint8 grayscale internally.
Minimum accepted corner quality relative to the strongest corner. Default: 0.01.
Minimum distance between detected corners. Default: 1.
Neighborhood used for the corner response. Default: 2.
Feature object with x, y, response, and other keypoint fields.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Finds image corners using OpenCV's Harris mode of the good-features detector. The returned coordinates use the image coordinate convention: origin at the upper-left.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Source reference: official OpenCV documentation. Example 1 is an adapted OpenCV workflow; Example 2 is an independent IPCV workflow.
